title: Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Assam

overview.short: Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in Assam, India.
overview.description: Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary is a protected area in Assam, India. It is located to the south-west of Guwahati, covering an area of about 4.14 km². The sanctuary was notified in 1989 to protect the unique wetland ecosystem of Deepor Beel, a permanent freshwater lake and Ramsar site. The lake and sanctuary are important habitats for many resident and migratory bird species, including globally threatened species such as the spot-billed pelican and greater adjutant.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dipor Bil
topPlaces.description: Dipor Bil, also spelled Deepor Beel (Pron: dɪpɔ:(r) bɪl) (bil or beel means "lake" in the local Assamese language), is located to the south-west of Guwahati city, in Kamrup Metropolitan district of Assam, India. It is a permanent freshwater lake, in a former channel of the Brahmaputra River, to the south of the main river.

topPlaces.name: Lankeshwar Temple
topPlaces.description: Lankeshwar Temple (Assamese: লংকেশ্বৰ দেৱালয়) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva on top of a hill in the western part of Guwahati, Assam, India, near the campus of Gauhati University. Lankeshwar is one of the many forms of Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Dharapur
topPlaces.description: Dharapur is a census town in Kamrup Metropolitan district in the state of Assam, India.

topPlaces.name: Azara, Guwahati
topPlaces.description: Azara is a locality in the western part of Guwahati.

topPlaces.name: Swahid Smarak Kshetra
topPlaces.description: Swahid Smarak Kshetra is a memorial and park in Boragaon, Guwahati, Assam, India, dedicated to the martyrs of the historic Assam Movement (1979–1985). The memorial commemorates the sacrifice of 860 numbers of agitators who lost their lives during the mass movement that sought to protect the cultural, linguistic and territorial identity of Assam.

topPlaces.name: Maligaon Chariali
topPlaces.description: Maligaon Chariali is the focal -point of Maligaon, in Guwahati. It is located between Jalukbari Point and Kamakhya foot hill of famous Kamakhya Temple.

topPlaces.name: Betkuchi
topPlaces.description: Betkuchi is the locality in Guwahati, Assam, India; surrounded by the localities of Jyotikuchi, Lokhra and Garchuk.

topPlaces.name: Adabari
topPlaces.description: Adabari is a locality in Guwahati.

It is a permanent freshwater lake, in a former channel of the Brahmaputra River, to the south of the main river.

Lankeshwar Temple (Assamese: লংকেশ্বৰ দেৱালয়) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva on top of a hill in the western part of Guwahati, Assam, India, near the campus of Gauhati University. Lankeshwar is one of the many forms of Lord Shiva.
Dharapur is a census town in Kamrup Metropolitan district in the state of Assam, India.

Swahid Smarak Kshetra is a memorial and park in Boragaon, Guwahati, Assam, India, dedicated to the martyrs of the historic Assam Movement (1979–1985). The memorial commemorates the sacrifice of 860 numbers of agitators who lost their lives during the mass movement that sought to protect the cultural, linguistic and territorial identity of Assam.

Betkuchi is the locality in Guwahati, Assam, India; surrounded by the localities of Jyotikuchi, Lokhra and Garchuk.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (7 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (12 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Deepar Beel Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dipor Bil, Lankeshwar Temple, Dharapur, Azara, Guwahati, Swahid Smarak Kshetra.
